title: Question: what will lxt2 do for me?
body:
---


Author Name: **Edmond Cote** (@edcote)
Original Redmine Message: 2663 from https://www.veripool.org



---

... other than being a better performing/compressed/etc. format than vcd, obviously ;)

My typical workflow to look at waveform dumps is to convert vcd to wlf and use ModelSim waveform viewer (instead of GTKWave+).  A major annoyance is that this strips (or I don't have the begin with) the direction of the signals.  Everything is a wire.

Other than capacity, are there reasons why I should consider trying lxt2 and gtkwave again?
